summary: Frontend testing completed for Trust Section feature. All 17 tests passed. The 'Why We're Loved' trust/social proof section is correctly displayed on homepage with 3 cards (Google rating, 85% retention, Deeply Trusted) and is editable in admin Homepage Sections tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust section feature is complete. TrustSection.jsx displays 3 cards with animated number counters and IntersectionObserver for entrance animations. Admin can edit title/subtitle and toggle visibility from Homepage Sections tab.

features_tested.feature: Trust section appears on homepage with data-testid='trust-section'
features_tested.details: Trust section found with correct data-testid attribute
H2 heading correctly shows 'Why We're Loved'
All 3 cards found with correct data-testid attributes
Card displays 5.0 Google Rating with 5 gold stars (google-stars testid)
Card displays '85%' with 'Stay With Us' label
Card displays 'Deeply Trusted' with heart icon and description

features_tested.feature: TrustSection in admin Homepage Sections tab
Admin title input shows 'Why We're Loved'
features_tested.details: Title input field contains correct default title

features_tested.feature: Admin subtitle input shows 'Trusted by our community'
features_tested.details: Subtitle input field contains correct default subtitle
Switch component with role='switch' found in trust section row
Toggle state changes from 'checked' to 'unchecked' on click

features_tested.feature: Sessions tab still has Personal Sessions

features_tested.details: Found Unified Availability Calendar, Element Visibility & Order, Session Testimonials, Session Questions
22 session rows found with expand/collapse capability
